0.details:
Steve was a kind and loyal friend
He had a great sense of humour and was always fun
They say only the good die young and it feels like this here
He loved his family and was devoted to his children
0.model_generation:
Dear Steve’s beloved family,

I was heartbroken to learn of Steve’s passing. He was a kind and loyal friend, and his warmth touched everyone who knew him. His great sense of humour made gatherings brighter; he had a gift for finding laughter even in the smallest moments. It feels unfair that he was taken from us so soon—it truly feels like only the good die young. I will always cherish the memories of our adventures, his infectious laughter, and his unwavering support. Steve’s devotion to his children and his love for his family were evident in everything he did. I hope you find comfort in each other’s arms and in the countless lives he enriched with his generosity and spirit. Please know that you are in my thoughts, and I’m here to offer any support you may need during this difficult time.

With deepest sympathy and love,
0.final_version: My good friend Steve was the epitome of kindness, a loyal pal of over thirty years who always kept in contact no matter the time of distance between us who would do anything for you. In person he was incredibly funny, an uplifting presence in all of our lives. His passing leaves a void that will be impossible to fill. Above all Steve loved his family and was utterly devoted to his wife and two daughters. They say that only the good die young, and that is certainly true in this case. 49 is too soon, too early to lose a father, husband, son, brother and uncle and he will be missed by all for the rest of our lives. I hope that his children will become stronger and will use his passing to drive them through the rest of their lives, inspiring them to make him proud and to make the most of their own limited time on this earth.

1.details:
I have utmost faith in you to succeed in these exams
Without doubt intelligent enough
Dedicated and focused
Ambitious and driven
Just another step on what will likely be a long and successful life and career
1.model_generation: I know how hard you’ve been working and I have utmost faith you’ll succeed in these exams. You are more than intelligent enough; your dedication and focus have already set you apart. Every late night of study, every practice problem solved, every moment of perseverance has brought you one step closer to the outcome you deserve. Remember that ambition and drive like yours don’t go unnoticed—they fuel progress and open doors you might not yet imagine. This exam is just another milestone on a journey that promises a brilliant future. Whatever the result, you will learn, grow, and move forward. Keep your head high and stay confident—everything you’ve invested in is leading you toward success. Trust in your abilities, lean on your strengths, and keep pushing toward your goals. I believe in you completely, and I can’t wait to see how far you’ll go. Go show the world what you’re made of—you’ve got this.
1.final_version: I'm just sending you this message to offer you good luck and encouragement for your forthcoming exams. I have the utmost faith that you will succeed, as you have in every other challenge in your life to date. Your intellect is enormous and I am sure that your focus, dedication and drive will lead to success here and throughout your life. You have always been ambitious and keen to maximise your potential and this will serve you well, now and in the future. I have no doubt that these exams will just be another step on what I am sure will be a successful life and career and I wish you nothing but the best. Trust in yourself, your brain and your work ethic and all will be well. I very much look forward to treating you to a few drinks to toast your success and have pencilled in a date in July for that event!

2.details:
thank you for visiting me in hospital
very scary time of my life when your support was hugely important
you travelled a long distance to get here and it is very much appreciated
2.model_generation:
Dear Friend,

I can’t express how grateful I am for your visit at the hospital last week. Facing such a frightening time in my life was overwhelming, but your presence made all the difference. Your kindness and encouragement helped me stay positive when I felt most vulnerable. Even simple moments, like your stories and warm smile, brought me comfort I didn’t know I needed.

It meant the world that you traveled so many miles to be by my side. I know it wasn’t easy to rearrange your schedule or spend hours on the road, and yet you did it without hesitation. Your dedication and selflessness lifted my spirits and reminded me that I’m surrounded by people who truly care.

Thank you for offering your time, compassion, and unwavering support. I feel incredibly fortunate to have you in my life, and I will never forget the comfort you brought me during this challenging period.

With deepest appreciation,
Your friend
2.final_version:
Dear Friend,

I can’t express how grateful I am for your visit at the hospital last week. Facing such a frightening time in my life was overwhelming, but your presence made all the difference. Your kindness and encouragement helped me stay positive when I felt most vulnerable. Just the thought that you had made such a significant effort to be with me gave me so much positivity and strength to face my toughest life challenge to date.

It meant the world that you travelled so many miles to be by my side. I know it wasn’t easy to rearrange your schedule or spend hours on the road, and yet you did it without hesitation. Your dedication and selflessness lifted my spirits and reminded me that I’m surrounded by people who truly care.

Thank you for offering your time, compassion, and unwavering support. I feel incredibly fortunate to have you in my life, and I will never forget the comfort you brought me during this challenging period.

With deepest appreciation,
Your friend

edits.removed: Even simple moments, like your stories and warm smile, brought me comfort I didn’t know I needed.

3.details:
21st birthday
So proud of you son
growing into a kind, thoughtful and intelligent young man
I loved you as a child and I love you as an adult and peer
3.model_generation:
Today marks your twenty-first birthday, a milestone that fills my heart with pride and joy. Watching you grow from a curious toddler into a kind, thoughtful, and intelligent young man has been my greatest privilege. Each step of the way, you have amazed me with your compassion—whether offering a listening ear to a friend in need or standing up for what you believe is right. Your dedication to learning, your courage to face challenges, and your loyalty to those you love inspire me every day.

I loved you unconditionally as a child, swooning over your first steps and beaming at every accomplishment. Today, I love you not only as your parent but as a fellow traveler on life’s journey. As you embrace the freedoms and responsibilities of adulthood, know that my support, admiration, and love will always be with you. Here’s to you, and to many more years of laughter, growth, and shared memories.
3.final_version:
Today marks your twenty-first birthday, a milestone that fills my heart with pride and joy. Watching you grow from a curious toddler into a kind, thoughtful, and intelligent young man has been my greatest privilege. Each step of the way, you have amazed me with your compassion—whether offering a listening ear to a friend in need or standing up for what you believe is right. Your dedication to learning, your courage to face challenges, and your loyalty to those you love inspire me every day.

I loved you unconditionally as a child, amazed by your first steps and beaming at every accomplishment. Today, I love you not only as your parent but as a fellow traveller on life’s journey, someone with whom I can discuss the world as an equal who has as much to teach me as I have taught them. As you embrace the freedoms and responsibilities of adulthood, know that my support, admiration, and love will always be with you. Here’s to you, and to many more years of laughter, growth, and shared memories.

4.details:
I apologise from the bottom of my heart
I know that I betrayed your trust in  a way that cannot be justified
I understand how important trust is to friendship and so I understand the depth of my betrayal
I hope that one day you can bring yourself to forgive me
4.model_generation:
Dear Friend,

I apologize from the bottom of my heart for betraying your trust in a way that cannot be justified. I know that trust is the foundation of any true friendship, and I understand the depth of my betrayal. My actions were thoughtless and selfish, and I regret the pain I have caused you.

I take full responsibility for what I did and recognize that no excuse can erase the hurt you feel. Your belief in me means more than I ever realized, and I am devastated that I failed to honor it. I understand if you need time and space to heal, and I promise to respect whatever boundaries you set.

I hope that one day you can bring yourself to forgive me. I am committed to earning back your trust and demonstrating through my actions that I truly value our friendship.

With sincere apologies,
4.final_version:
Dear Friend,

I apologize from the bottom of my heart for betraying your trust in a way that cannot be justified. I know that trust is the foundation of any true friendship, and I understand the depth of my betrayal. My actions were thoughtless and selfish, and I regret the pain I have caused you.

I take full responsibility for what I did and recognize that no excuse can erase the hurt you feel. Your belief in me means more than I ever realized, and I am devastated that I failed to honour it. I understand if you need time and space to heal, and I promise to respect whatever boundaries you set.

I hope that one day you can bring yourself to forgive me. I am committed to earning back your trust and demonstrating through my actions that I truly value our friendship. I know that things may never be quite the same again, but hope that we can rebuild a friendship that has been an important constant in my life.

With sincere apologies,

5.details:
Hey mate, how is it going? it's been too long.
There has been a huge distance between us
I am on holiday in Corfu on the very same beach we had one of the greatest night's drinking of our lives
It triggered some wonderful memories and made me determined to keep in closer touch and make an effort to see you soon
5.model_generation:
Hey mate,

How’s it going? It’s been far too long since we last caught up, and I realise there’s been a huge distance between us lately. I’m writing from Corfu, sitting on the very beach where we had one of the greatest nights of drinking of our lives. Watching the sunset here triggered a flood of fantastic memories—late-night laughs, spontaneous dance moves, and that karaoke moment.

This trip has made me determined to stay in closer touch and bridge that gap. Let’s not let geography or busy schedules keep us apart any longer. I’d love to hear what you’ve been up to and plan a reunion soon, whether that’s meeting here in Greece or catching up closer to home. It would mean a lot to me to share new adventures and relive old ones with you.

Drop me a line when you can, and let’s make a date to reconnect.

Cheers!
5.final_version:
Hey mate,

How’s it going? It’s been far too long since we last caught up, and I realise there’s been a huge distance between us lately. I’m writing from Corfu, sitting on the very beach where we had one of the greatest nights of drinking of our lives. Watching the sunset here triggered a flood of fantastic memories—late-night laughs, spontaneous dance moves, and drunken sharking.

This trip has made me determined to stay in closer touch and bridge that gap. As I get older and aware of my increasingly limited time on this earth I have decided not to waste time putting things off until tomorrow that I should do today. Let’s not let geography or busy schedules be an excuse for us not seeing more of each other. I’d love to hear what you’ve been up to and plan a reunion soon, whether that’s meeting here in Greece or catching up closer to home. It would mean a lot to me to share new adventures and relive old ones with you.

Drop me a line when you can, and let’s make a date to reconnect.

Cheers!

post_survey.present_other: Just my personal and relatable voice.
